    R

    receiveMission(Mission) - Method in class model.Hospital
    Records that the hospital received a mission.
    removeDrone(Drone) - Method in class model.DroneBase
    Removes a drone from this base.

    removeDroneBase(DroneBase) - Method in class model.MapModel
     
    removeMedicalSite(MedicalSite) - Method in class model.MapModel
     
    removeMedicalStaff(MedicalStaff) - Method in class model.MapModel
    Removes a medical staff member and their associated UserPoint.
    removeOrganType(String) - Method in class model.CollectionCenter
    Removes an organ type from the center.
    removeUserPoint(UserPoint) - Method in class model.MapModel
     
    removeWaypoint(Position) - Method in class model.Route
    Removes a waypoint from the route.
    RequestStatus - Enum Class in model.enums
    Represents the status of a delivery request.
    requireText(String, String) - Static method in class model.MedicalSite
    Checks that a text value is not null or blank.
    resetUserPoints() - Method in class model.VoronoiCell
    Clears all user points from this cell before recomputation.
    Route - Class in model
    Represents the route followed by a drone.
